_style: All images share this suffix: warm amber side lighting, dark wood surface, shallow depth of field, moody studio atmosphere, photorealistic, professional product photography, 16:9 aspect ratio, high quality
_notes: NEVER use brand names — describe the physical object instead
Floor modeler = large black floor unit with touchscreen display, multiple footswitches, expression pedal
Stompbox modeler = compact metal box with small screen, 3-4 footswitches
Tube amp = tall head unit with metal chassis, glowing tubes visible through vents, tolex covering
Combo amp = single unit with speaker and controls on top, fabric grille
Overdrive pedal = small colored metal stompbox with 3 knobs and a footswitch
Pedalboard = flat board with multiple stompboxes connected by patch cables
FRFR speaker = tall wedge-shaped powered PA speaker, black, on a stand
Always describe what the camera SEES, not what the thing IS
